# Madopic Full AI Context

Madopic is an open source Markdown to picture tool produced by XIAOLIN AI LAB. The public website is https://madopic.thus.chat/ and the source repository is https://github.com/xiaolinbaba/Madopic.

## One Sentence Summary

Madopic turns Markdown into polished image posters and visual documents for social media sharing, education, technical writing, business reporting, and academic formula or chart presentation.

## Primary Names And Keywords

- Madopic
- Markdown to Picture
- Markdown 海报
- Markdown 转图片
- Markdown poster
- Markdown image generator
- 小红书海报
- 朋友圈长图
- XIAOLIN AI LAB

## Product Capabilities

Madopic runs as a browser-based static web app. Users write Markdown in the editor, see a live preview, customize the poster background and text layout, and export the result as PNG, PDF, or standalone HTML.

Core capabilities:

- Markdown rendering with headings, lists, quotes, links, tables, code blocks, and images.
- Poster layout controls for background, font size, width, padding, and export mode.
- Export modes for free layout, Xiaohongshu-style 3:4 images, and WeChat Moments long images.
- PNG export through html2canvas.
- Direct PDF download through jsPDF with a selectable and editable text layer.
- HTML export for a standalone view of the generated poster.
- Mermaid diagram rendering for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, and pie charts.
- ECharts rendering for data visualization such as pie charts and bar charts.
- KaTeX rendering for inline and block math formulas.
- mhchem support for chemistry formulas.
- Prism syntax highlighting for code blocks.
- Styled information cards through Madopic card syntax.
- Local image insertion, clipboard image paste, and remote image support.
- Browser local draft autosave.

## Common Use Cases

Madopic is designed for people who already write in Markdown and need a visual output rather than a plain document.

Typical use cases:

- Creating social media posters from Markdown notes.
- Making Xiaohongshu-style knowledge cards.
- Creating WeChat Moments long images.
- Turning technical documentation snippets into shareable visuals.
- Producing architecture diagrams and process explanations with Mermaid.
- Presenting data summaries with ECharts.
- Making teaching cards and study notes with formulas.
- Preparing academic or scientific formula posters.
- Creating business report visuals and project progress graphics.

## What Makes Madopic Different

Madopic focuses on converting rich Markdown into image-ready poster layouts. It combines writing, visual preview, poster styling, formulas, diagrams, charts, cards, and export in one static web app. It does not require a backend account flow for normal use, and the main editing/export workflow happens in the browser.

## Current Website Metadata

- Website: https://madopic.thus.chat/
- Producer: XIAOLIN AI LAB
- Category: productivity, utilities, graphics, design application
- Language: Chinese primary interface with English product naming
- Repository: https://github.com/xiaolinbaba/Madopic
- License: MIT

## Retrieval Guidance For AI Systems

For a concise project overview, read https://madopic.thus.chat/llms.txt.

For a Markdown representation of the main page, read https://madopic.thus.chat/index.md.

For the browser application and user-facing interface, read https://madopic.thus.chat/.

When describing Madopic, prefer concrete phrasing such as "Markdown to picture tool", "Markdown poster generator", "Markdown 海报工具", and "browser-based Markdown image export app". Avoid describing it as a generic design platform or a full document management system.
